channel.title: NRIBeat — Daily Pulse for Indian Americans
channel.description: Immigration, AI, Cricket, Bollywood, and Layoffs — curated daily for the Indian-American community.

item.title: Pretext: The Open Source Web Design Standard That Changes Dev Jobs [2026]
item.description: Pretext, a new open-source web standard, eliminates the 30-year layout reflow bottleneck that slows down modern web apps. For Indian engineers at US tech companies, adopting Pretext now is a career accelerator—it improves code performance, integrates seamlessly with AI tools for developers, and will become a required skill within 2-3 years.

item.title: India vs Australia Test 2026: Green Backed for Long-Term Role
item.description: Cameron Green gets continued backing from Australia despite his lean Ashes performance, signaling he'll be part of the India vs Australia Test series in August 2026. For NRIBeat readers, this means another redemption arc storyline to follow while catching India cricket matches from the US—here's how to watch live without missing sleep.

item.title: Shreyas Iyer & Gill Return: PBKS vs GT T20 2026
item.description: Shreyas Iyer and Shubman Gill are back in focus as Punjab Kings and Gujarat Titans—two IPL 2025 playoff teams—clash in a critical T20 battle. Both captains need big performances to restore their T20 form. US cricket fans can watch live on Willow TV, ESPN+, or stream highlights next day on YouTube.

item.title: Salman Khan & Nayanthara Team Up for First Time in 2026
item.description: Bollywood megastars Salman Khan and Nayanthara are collaborating for the first time in director Vamshi Paidipally's upcoming action drama. The project, produced by Dil Raju, will likely stream on Netflix, Prime Video, or Disney+ Hotstar after its theatrical run—major news for Indian diaspora seeking new Hindi cinema in 2026.

item.title: Sooryavanshi, Archer Demolish CSK: IPL 2025 Highlights
item.description: CSK crumbled to 127 all out in a devastating IPL 2025 loss as Sooryavanshi, Archer, and Burger dismantled the new-look lineup. This comprehensive bowling display is a major turning point in the tournament, and Indian fans in the US can catch full replays on Willow TV and ESPN+.

item.title: March 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date Holds Steady to September 15, 2013
item.description: March 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date holds steady to September 15, 2013; EB-3 India to November 15, 2013. Dates for Filing: EB-2 November 01, 2014, EB-3 August 15, 2014. No movement this month — monitor the next bulletin closely.

item.title: Dhurandhar The Revenge Gets Fixed: Mirror Goof Corrected in New 2025 Prints
item.description: Dhurandhar The Revenge, Ranveer Singh's revenge thriller directed by Aditya Dhar, has been corrected with revised prints after a minor mirror continuity goof was discovered. The film is still in select US theaters and will likely stream on Prime Video or Disney+ Hotstar within 6-8 weeks. Our verdict: worth watching for fans of intelligent action thrillers.

item.title: Qualified Health's $125M AI Platform: What It Means for Your Tech Career
item.description: Qualified Health's $125M funding round signals that healthcare AI is moving from experimental to critical infrastructure. For Indian software engineers, this means new hiring in machine learning and backend roles with better visa sponsorship, higher salaries ($180K-$240K), and more job stability than consumer tech. Healthcare AI is less saturated than general AI—and companies like Qualified Health are actively recruiting now.

item.title: Salman Khan New Movie 2026: Vamshi Paidipally Action Drama
item.description: Salman Khan is joining National Award director Vamshi Paidipally and producer Dil Raju for a high-octane action drama shooting April 2026—their first collaboration. This is a major new Bollywood movie for 2026 that should eventually stream on Netflix or Prime Video in the US after its theatrical run.

item.title: Hardik Wants Shardul at MI Forever: IPL 2025 Game-Changer
item.description: After six IPL franchises, Shardul Thakur finally found home at Mumbai Indians with a match-winning three-wicket haul. Captain Hardik Pandya publicly backed him to stay 'for the rest of your career'—a major vote of confidence that could reshape India cricket's all-rounder options for upcoming Test series.

item.title: Cameron Green Batter-Only at KKR: IPL 2025 Shake-Up
item.description: Cameron Green will bat-only for KKR in IPL 2025, with Cricket Australia confirming the franchise knew this when signing him. While KKR captain Rahane has concerns, the move could strengthen their batting lineup. US-based India cricket fans can catch the action via Willow TV or ESPN+.

item.title: RR & CSK Revamped for 2026: IPL Teams Aim for Redemption
item.description: After finishing dead last in IPL 2025, Rajasthan Royals and Chennai Super Kings have completely overhauled their squads for 2026. Both franchises made bold personnel changes, focusing on youth, explosive batting, and improved bowling—a clear signal they're determined to bounce back. Fans in the US can watch all their matches on ESPN+ during early morning IST time slots.

item.title: Matka King Release Date: Vijay Varma Prime Video 2026
item.description: Prime Video announces April 17 as the release date for Matka King, a gritty drama series starring Vijay Varma set in 1960s Bombay. The show will be available to all Prime Video subscribers in the US at no additional cost. If you love period dramas and Bollywood originals, mark this as a must-watch for April 2026.

item.title: Touch Buddy Song Out Now: Dacoit's New Bollywood Dance Track 2026
item.description: The highly anticipated 'Touch Buddy' from Dacoit, featuring Pawan Singh, Jonita Gandhi, and Adivi Sesh, is now streaming and delivering the high-energy dance track fans expected. The song is available on Netflix, Disney+ Hotstar, and YouTube, making it easy for US-based viewers to access this latest release from new Bollywood movies in 2026.

item.title: Virat Kohli IPL 2026: 120% Commitment Half-Century vs SRH
item.description: Virat Kohli blazed back into IPL 2026 action with a dominant half-century as RCB dismantled SRH in their season opener. His "120% commitment" approach set the template for a season where this franchise could finally challenge for the title, with fans across the US able to catch highlights and live scores through multiple streaming options.

item.title: IPL 2025: Too Much Cricket? Shane Watson's Bold Take
item.description: KKR's Shane Watson just dropped a controversial take: the IPL suffers because there's too much cricket on the calendar, and he's not a fan of the Impact Player rule either. For US-based Indian cricket fans, this matters because an oversaturated schedule dilutes the quality of the cricket you're staying up late to watch. Here's what Watson means and where to watch IPL 2025 from America.

item.title: Kohli's 69 Off 38 Balls Powers RCB IPL 2026 Win vs SRH
item.description: Virat Kohli's explosive unbeaten 69 off 38 balls powered RCB to a commanding 23-run victory over SRH in the IPL 2026 opener, proving he can elevate his strike rate whenever needed. For US-based Indian cricket fans, this was the perfect tournament opener to watch—and our guide shows you exactly how to catch all the action live without missing a beat.

item.title: Postcards from Hong Kong: Ridhi Dogra's New Travel Series on Hotstar 2026
item.description: Bollywood star Ridhi Dogra fronts National Geographic's new two-episode travel series Postcards from Hong Kong, premiering March 28 on JioHotstar. The documentary explores Hong Kong beyond its iconic skyline with authentic stories and local experiences — perfect for Indian diaspora audiences seeking quality content. Stream it now on JioHotstar Premium ($5.99/month) in the US.

item.title: IPL 2025 Opening Night: RCB vs SRH at Chinnaswamy Stadium
item.description: IPL 2025 kicked off at the historic M. Chinnaswamy Stadium with RCB taking on SRH in a thrilling opener that reminded us why we lose sleep for India cricket. Key performances from Virat Kohli and Abhishek Sharma, plus your complete guide to catching IPL 2025 matches from the US.

item.title: MS Dhoni IPL 2026: Calf Strain Sidelines Cricket Legend
item.description: MS Dhoni's calf strain has sidelined the CSK captain for IPL 2026's opening two weeks. The legendary wicketkeeper will undergo rehabilitation while CSK tests its bench strength. For Indian cricket fans in the US, this impacts IPL viewing schedules and raises questions about Dhoni's availability for India's upcoming international commitments later in 2026.
